mechanics.excerpt: SKILLS AATS" Subskills of the Arts Skill can include any area of artistic expression, from music t0 painting to sculpture Note that the subskills suggested below are broader categories than most characters would have but they are intended t0 show the range possibilities For example character would probably have the Art/Trumpet Skill rather than the ArtyMusic Performance Skill: Sample Art Subskills: Architecture Dance Music Composition_ Music Performance Illustration, Sculpture_ Writing: Painting; Theater, Choreography; Poetry; Weaving also easier t0 Iearn For clarity: use the term you when referring to your character and your opponent" when referring to the other character in the melee For each skill bonus point in Brawling the character may choose learn one ofthe following maneuvers See also Special Maneuvers_ P 114- Bear Hug: successful, your opponent is pinned and can: not make melee attack in the following turn_ At the end of the turn in which character was pinned an Opposed Strength Check iS made_ If the target character iS successful_ he has bro ken your grip and may make an attack normally the following turn.
